title: Add dark mode support
description: Implement dark mode theme across the application. Includes color scheme updates, toggle setting in user preferences, and full coverage of UI components.

title: Fix login timeout
description: Resolve issue where user sessions expire prematurely after 5 minutes of inactivity. Adjust session timeout to 30 minutes and add keep-alive mechanism.

title: Update API docs
description: Update API documentation to reflect new endpoints for v2.4.0, including request/response examples, authentication header changes, and deprecation notices.

title: Upgrade database version
description: Plan migration from PostgreSQL 14 to 16 with minimal downtime. Prepare migration scripts, test rollback procedures, and coordinate with ops team.

title: Implement user profile avatars
description: Allow users to upload and display custom profile avatars. Requires frontend upload component, backend storage integration, and thumbnail generation.
